name: Techies
description: Measurements made. Bombs built. Powder's dry. Okay, let's blow something up! Squee, Spleen, and Spoon, the Techies.

abilities.name: Minefield Sign
abilities.description: Teleport sources may only add a certain distance to the distance counter, regardless of the teleport distance, and only proc one explosion.

abilities.name: Sticky Bomb
abilities.description: Lobs a Sticky Bomb toward the area-targeted location. Once the bomb latches itself to an enemy hero within proximity, it applies a movement speed slow. This unit does not feel the effects from any damage sources. It cannot be targeted by attacks or abilities and have its health bar temporarily hidden.

abilities.name: Reactive Tazer
abilities.description: Applies an offensive basic dispel and disarms enemy units attacking the Techies team. After the buff duration ends, the charge explodes, applying all negative effects onto enemy units within the radius. Enables casting Reactive Tazer on allied units, with all ability effects centering and following the targeted ally around. The ability now also deals damage to enemy units it disarms.

abilities.name: Blast Off!
abilities.description: The detonation upon landing also applies a non-lethal self-damage on Techies corresponding to a portion of their current health. The recipe for Spleen's Secret Sauce is sacrificing more health for more damage.

abilities.name: Proximity Mines
abilities.description: The mines reduce the affected enemy unit's magic resistance while dealing damage. The explosions deal more damage the closer the affected unit to the proximity radius.
